{{Quote|I have come to Tatooine to avenge the death of my father. At great expense, I learned he was eliminated by a Glymphid hitman who is also a contestant in tomorrow's Boonta Eve Race. I am Kam Nale, son of Borzu Nale. I'm making this recording in the event I do not survive the Boonta.|translated=1|Kam Nale vows to avenge Borzu|<ref name="PRT" />}}
'''Borzu Nale''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Fluggrian/Legends|Fluggrian]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]], and father of [[Kam Nale]]. During or prior to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Nale was [[Death/Legends|assassinated]] by the [[Glymphid/Legends|Glymphid]] [[Assassin/Legends|hit-man]] [[Aldar Beedo/Legends|Aldar Beedo]],<ref name="PRT" /> who was hired by Nale's rival, [[Orin Nyell]]<ref name="Databank">{{DB|character|rangotel|Tel, Rango "Tank Head"}}</ref>. This caused Kam Nale to endure a long lasting hunt for Beedo which inlcuded the Fluggrian changing his name to "Elan Mak," becoming a [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]],<ref name="PRT" /> and eventually reclaim his father's criminal empire. Borzu Nale was eventually avenged during [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], when a [[Unidentified mercenary (Baroonda)|mercenary]] hired by Kam captured Beedo on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Baroonda/Legends|Baroonda]].
